item.title: CNC的最新發展 DMG MORI在展場蓋了一座城市 德國展覽是怎麼做的？【超認真少年】EMO EP2
item.itunes:title: CNC的最新發展 DMG MORI在展場蓋了一座城市 德國展覽是怎麼做的？【超認真少年】EMO EP2
item.itunes:author: 超認真少年Imserious
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V-5qh8jW508 Lucy and I went our separate ways, each looking for something attractive. In the end, the girls were just having fun. Special thanks to: Mizuno, Lao Xiezhen, REXON, TITANS of CNC MACHINING Shoes provided by: Mizuno Mizuno PRIME FIT LSII 71M BOA #GermanMechanicalExhibition #emo #cnc #Princess 📍Latest News/Partnership Information: https://portaly.cc/imserious 【Popular Videos】 \"Air Compressor\" - Basic demonstration tutorial, turns out everyone needs an air compressor at home. How to use Air compressor https://youtu.be/Wghd4LpM6DE Understanding CNC Basics! Unboxing a multi-million-dollar CNC machine from Germany! Taichung Precision Machinery [Hidden Factory] What's CNC? https://youtu.be/KZ0lIzlYHw4 Even selling to daughters at hardware stores? Taiwan Hardware Store Guide https://youtu.be/_Y0jLEeENp8 Daughter-in-law marrying in! Which company offers the highest salary, digging seriously? Revealed! Machine Tool Exhibition Part 2 [imserious] https://youtu.be/f0lWUPiUDnw Surprise marriage entry second wave! Father-in-law takes away the daughter to see the future big business [imserious] KITAGAWA Machine Tool \u0026 Chuck https://youtu.be/47cGn20vv5s
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V-5qh8jW508 Lucy and I went our separate ways, each looking for something attractive. In the end, the girls were just having fun. Special thanks to: Mizuno, Lao Xiezhen, REXON, TITANS of CNC MACHINING Shoes provided by: Mizuno Mizuno PRIME FIT LSII 71M BOA #GermanMechanicalExhibition #emo #cnc #Princess 📍Latest News/Partnership Information: https://portaly.cc/imserious 【Popular Videos】 \"Air Compressor\" - Basic demonstration tutorial, turns out everyone needs an air compressor at home. How to use Air compressor https://youtu.be/Wghd4LpM6DE Understanding CNC Basics! Unboxing a multi-million-dollar CNC machine from Germany! Taiwan Hardware Store Guide https://youtu.be/_Y0jLEeENp8 Daughter-in-law marrying in! Which company offers the highest salary, digging seriously? Revealed! Machine Tool Exhibition Part 2 [imserious] https://youtu.be/f0lWUPiUDnw Surprise marriage entry second wave! Father-in-law takes away the daughter to see the future big business [imserious] KITAGAWA Machine Tool \u0026 Chuck https://youtu.be/47cGn20vv5s
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V-5qh8jW508 Lucy and I went our separate ways, each looking for something attractive. In the end, the girls were just having fun. Special thanks to: Mizuno, Lao Xiezhen, REXON, TITANS of CNC MACHINING Shoes provided by: Mizuno Mizuno PRIME FIT LSII 71M BOA #GermanMechanicalExhibition #emo #cnc #Princess 📍Latest News/Partnership Information: https://portaly.cc/imserious 【Popular Videos】 \"Air Compressor\" - Basic demonstration tutorial, turns out everyone needs an air compressor at home. How to use Air compressor https://youtu.be/Wghd4LpM6DE Understanding CNC Basics! Unboxing a multi-million-dollar CNC machine from Germany! Taichung Precision Machinery [Hidden Factory] What's CNC? https://youtu.be/KZ0lIzlYHw4 Even selling to daughters at hardware stores? Taiwan Hardware Store Guide https://youtu.be/_Y0jLEeENp8 Daughter-in-law marrying in! Which company offers the highest salary, digging seriously? Revealed! Machine Tool Exhibition Part 2 [imserious] https://youtu.be/f0lWUPiUDnw Surprise marriage entry second wave! Father-in-law takes away the daughter to see the future big business [imserious] KITAGAWA Machine Tool \u0026 Chuck https://youtu.be/47cGn20vv5s

item.title: ￼有翅膀的賓士！最經典賓士和最新電動車賓士 歐翼敞篷都在這！賓士博物館【超認真少年】Benz Museum Feat.德國百靈BRAUN
